evals.expected_output: A well-structured daily briefing in Chinese covering international news, tech/AI, Chinese internet companies (ByteDance, Tencent, Xiaohongshu), overseas tech companies (NVIDIA, Microsoft, Meta, Google, Apple), and finance. Each news item has 3 sentences + a summary paragraph. Content is categorized by topic with emoji headers.
